extension.summary: Rivulet: watch Stremio-protocol catalogs, addons and streams in Kodi
extension.description: Rivulet is a Kodi client for the Stremio addon protocol: browse Discover and Search catalogs, install community Stremio addons from a manifest URL, resolve streams and play them back through an embedded or remote stremio-server-go streaming server, and optionally sync your addon collection with your Stremio account.
extension.disclaimer: This addon does not host, index or provide any media content. It is a client for third-party Stremio addons that you install yourself.
extension.news: v0.4.11: - Fix: playback now takes the screen immediately - video no longer starts hidden behind the menu until you press Back. - Fix: stopping playback no longer briefly spawns a duplicate Home screen. v0.4.10: - Fix: an addon that's briefly unavailable no longer freezes the UI - streams/search now query addons in parallel instead of one at a time. - Fix: an expired Stremio session now prompts a clean re-login instead of silently failing. - Fix: installed addons' info now refreshes automatically instead of going stale forever. - Fix: a rare crash could leave a screen stuck open; screens now always close properly. - Fix: two addon actions running at the same time could silently lose one of them - now safely retried. - Security: the streaming server binary download now always verifies its integrity before installing. v0.4.9: - Fix: logging in no longer wipes addons you installed while logged out - addon sync is now a proper two-way sync. - New: Settings > Account > "Sync addons now" to force and confirm a sync. - New: a loading spinner (with progress and cancel) now shows during Search/Discover/Streams lookups instead of a frozen screen. - Fix: the app icon's logo graphic is now properly centered. v0.4.8: - Fix: movies no longer show a pointless "Play" step - pick a movie and go straight to sources. - Fix: a stray "[/B]" no longer shows on the top stream row. - Fix: Library and Add-ons no longer fail to open from the new Home. - Home menu got icons, short descriptions and a login-status line. v0.4.7: - New: a custom, non-standard Home/Discover/Search/Detail/Streams UI (Library/Add-ons/Settings still classic). - Showcase now reports errors (notification + log) instead of failing silently.
